env.SUPABASE_URL: TODO: set SUPABASE_URL in your shell environment (never commit this value)
env.SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY: REPLACE_ME — get from Supabase dashboard > Settings > API > service_role key (server-side only)

env.GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN: REPLACE_ME — create a fine-grained PAT at github.com/settings/tokens with repo scope for dmdwebster-collab

env.NOTION_API_KEY: REPLACE_ME — create an internal integration at notion.so/my-integrations and share your workspace pages with it

env.N8N_BASE_URL: REPLACE_ME — your n8n instance URL (e.g. https://n8n.yourdomain.com)

_setup_instructions.step_1: Copy this file to ~/.claude/mcp.json OR keep it in .claude/mcp.json (Claude Code reads both)
_setup_instructions.step_2: Replace all REPLACE_ME values with real credentials — use env variables, do NOT hardcode
_setup_instructions.step_3: Never commit real credentials. Add .claude/mcp.json to .gitignore if you fill in real values locally
_setup_instructions.step_4: Restart Claude Code after updating this file for changes to take effect
_setup_instructions.payspyre_note: For PaySpyre specifically: the Supabase MCP gives Claude live access to your shared schema across all 4 surfaces. Run `supabase gen types typescript --local` after any schema change.
